package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_network_calls_retry_loop_without_backoff: Layer: Network calls. Flag network retry loops that immediately retry and amplify load.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario571Negative(ctx context.Context, client *http.Client, urls []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, url := range urls {
		req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
		if err == nil && req != nil { total += len(url) }
	}
	return total
}
